videos.title: Standard has been saved by Tarkir!
videos.description:
It's time to get to Mythic with Mono Green Ugin Ramp in MTG Arena

@Rarran and I call Ugin unplayable: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-CRTxniLyVo

Decklist - https://moxfield.com/decks/Q305MC5xlEitxaQZJ4hiRA

videos.title: Every card has the word Dragon and it works
videos.description:
This deck features 24 dragons and 12 more dragon-themed cards. It has 30 new cards from Tarkir: Dragonstorm and was filmed in the Early Access even.

See new Ugin in action: https://youtu.be/kRgPDJrCMUE?si=apt7ND0YIBKtrD6M
